"use client"

import * as React from "react"
import { OTPInput, OTPInputContext } from "input-otp"
import { Minus } from "lucide-react"
import { tw } from "~/tw";

const InputOTP = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof OTPInput>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof OTPInput>
>(({ className, containerClassName, ...props }, ref) => (
  <OTPInput
    ref={ref}
    containerClassName={tw.join("flex items-center gap-2 has-[:disabled]:opacity-50", containerClassName)}
    className={tw.join("disabled:cursor-not-allowed", className)}
    {...props}
  />
))
InputOTP.displayName = "InputOTP"

const InputOTPGroup = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<"div">,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<"div">
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <div ref={ref} className={tw.join("flex items-center", className)} {...props} />
))
InputOTPGroup.displayName = "InputOTPGroup"


const inputOTPSlotDiv = tw.style({
    pointerEvents: "pointer-events-none",
    position: "absolute",
    inset: "inset-0",
    display: "flex",
    alignItems: "items-center",
    justifyContent: "justify-center",
});

const inputOTPSlotDiv2 = tw.style({
    position: "relative",
    display: "flex",
    height: "h-9",
    width: "w-9",
    alignItems: "items-center",
    justifyContent: "justify-center",
    borderWidth: ["border-y", "border-r", "border-input"],
    fontSize: "text-sm",
    boxShadow: "shadow-sm",
    transitionProperty: "transition-all",
    first: {
        borderRadius: "first:rounded-l-md",
        borderWidth: "first:border-l",
    },
    last: {
        borderRadius: "last:rounded-r-md",
    },
});

const InputOTPSlot = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<"div">,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<"div"> & { index: number }
>(({ index, className, ...props }, ref) => {
  const inputOTPContext = React.useContext(OTPInputContext)
  const { char, hasFakeCaret, isActive } = inputOTPContext.slots[index]

  return (
    <div
      ref={ref}
      className={inputOTPSlotDiv2.class(isActive && "z-10 ring-1 ring-ring", className)}
      {...props}
    >
      {char}
      {hasFakeCaret && (
        <div className={inputOTPSlotDiv.class()}>
          <div className={tw.join("h-4 w-px animate-caret-blink bg-foreground duration-1000")} />
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  )
})
InputOTPSlot.displayName = "InputOTPSlot"

const InputOTPSeparator = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<"div">,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<"div">
>(({ ...props }, ref) => (
  <div ref={ref} role="separator" {...props}>
    <Minus />
  </div>
))
InputOTPSeparator.displayName = "InputOTPSeparator"

export { InputOTP, InputOTPGroup, InputOTPSlot, InputOTPSeparator }
